sentences.text_translation_en: Why did you take leave today?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 我早上去做体检了，刚回来。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ zǎoshang qù zuò tǐjiǎn le, gāng huílái.
sentences.text_translation: Ertalab tibbiy ko'rikdan o'tib keldim, hozirgina qaytdim.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Утром ходил на медосмотр, только что вернулся.
sentences.text_translation_en: I went for a health check-up this morning and just got back.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 没有。公司每年都安排一次体检，今天轮到我了。
sentences.pinyin: Méiyǒu. Gōngsī měinián dōu ānpái yí cì tǐjiǎn, jīntiān lún dào wǒ le.
sentences.text_translation: Yo'q. Kompaniya har yili bir marta tibbiy ko'rik tashkil qiladi, bugun mening navbatim keldi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Нет. Компания каждый год устраивает медосмотр, сегодня была моя очередь.
sentences.text_translation_en: No. The company arranges a check-up every year, and today it was my turn.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_translation_en: What items does the check-up examine?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 身高、体重、视力、血压，还有抽血和B超。
sentences.pinyin: Shēngāo, tǐzhòng, shìlì, xuèyā, hái yǒu chōuxuè hé B chāo.
sentences.text_translation: Bo'y, vazn, ko'rish, qon bosimi, yana qon olish va UTT (B-ultratovush).
sentences.text_translation_ru: Рост, вес, зрение, давление, ещё забор крови и УЗИ.
sentences.text_translation_en: Height, weight, eyesight, blood pressure, plus a blood draw and an ultrasound.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 有一点点疼，但是很快，几秒钟就好了。
sentences.pinyin: Yǒu yì diǎndiǎn téng, dànshì hěn kuài, jǐ miǎozhōng jiù hǎo le.
sentences.text_translation: Bir ozgina og'riydi, lekin juda tez, bir necha soniyada tugaydi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Чуть-чуть больно, но очень быстро — за несколько секунд и всё.
sentences.text_translation_en: It hurts just a tiny bit, but it's quick — done in a few seconds.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 大部分当天就能拿，有些要等两三天。
sentences.pinyin: Dà bùfen dàngtiān jiù néng ná, yǒuxiē yào děng liǎng sān tiān.
sentences.text_translation: Ko'pchiligini o'sha kuni olsa bo'ladi, ba'zilarini ikki-uch kun kutish kerak.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Большинство можно получить в тот же день, некоторые нужно подождать два-три дня.
sentences.text_translation_en: Most you can get the same day; some take two or three days.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_translation_en: Are you worried about the check-up results?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 有一点担心，但是平时生活规律，应该没什么大问题。
sentences.pinyin: Yǒu yì diǎn dānxīn, dànshì píngshí shēnghuó guīlǜ, yīnggāi méi shénme dà wèntí.
sentences.text_translation: Bir oz xavotirlanaman, lekin odatda turmushim tartibli, katta muammo bo'lmasa kerak.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Немного переживаю, но обычно у меня размеренный образ жизни, так что больших проблем быть не должно.
sentences.text_translation_en: A little worried, but my daily life is regular, so there shouldn't be any big problems.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 体检以后拿到报告可以看看，有问题早发现早治疗。
sentences.pinyin: Tǐjiǎn yǐhòu ná dào bàogào kěyǐ kàn kan, yǒu wèntí zǎo fāxiàn zǎo zhìliáo.
sentences.text_translation: Tibbiy ko'rikdan keyin hisobotni olib ko'rib chiqsang bo'ladi, muammo bo'lsa erta aniqlanib, erta davolanadi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: После осмотра можно посмотреть заключение: если есть проблема, чем раньше выявишь, тем раньше начнёшь лечить.
sentences.text_translation_en: After the check-up you can look at the report — catching a problem early means treating it early.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 对。健康最重要，所以我每年都按时去体检。
sentences.pinyin: Duì. Jiànkāng zuì zhòngyào, suǒyǐ wǒ měinián dōu ànshí qù tǐjiǎn.
sentences.text_translation: To'g'ri. Sog'liq eng muhimi, shuning uchun har yili o'z vaqtida tibbiy ko'rikka boraman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Да. Здоровье важнее всего, поэтому я каждый год вовремя прохожу медосмотр.
sentences.text_translation_en: Right. Health matters most, so I go for a check-up on time every year.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 下次体检的时候记得叫我一起。
sentences.pinyin: Xià cì tǐjiǎn de shíhou jìde jiào wǒ yìqǐ.
sentences.text_translation: Keyingi tibbiy ko'rikda meni ham birga chaqirishni unutma.
sentences.text_translation_ru: В следующий раз на медосмотр не забудь позвать и меня.
sentences.text_translation_en: Next time you go for a check-up, remember to ask me to come along.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 好，到时候我提前告诉你。
sentences.pinyin: Hǎo, dàoshíhou wǒ tíqián gàosu nǐ.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Хорошо, тогда я заранее тебе сообщу.
sentences.text_translation_en: Okay, I'll let you know in advance when the time comes.
sentences.speaker: B
